title: Entity Pin Cushions
description: Lets arrows stick into most mobs, not just players.
body: # Entity Pin Cushions --- [![discord](https://i.imgur.com/vU8pcbf.png)](https://discord.com/invite/rURmwrzUcz) ![-](https://i.imgur.com/yZzzW4Q.pngg) [![curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/rpoyjVG.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-pin-cushions) ![-](https://i.imgur.com/VgKekoJ.png) [![modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/7fioiRx.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-pin-cushions) ![-](https://i.imgur.com/tiNmDIH.png) [![github](https://i.imgur.com/EYNx6oL.png)](https://github.com/Traben-0/stuck_arrows_for_all) ![-](https://i.imgur.com/yar5K6v.png) [![kofi](https://i.imgur.com/xdhWKwC.png)](https://ko-fi.com/traben) --- # About Lets arrows (and bee stingers) stick into most mobs, not just players. ![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c94a0ac8e69905ead32ae0e96618f9d3eadf58d.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c94a0ac8e69905ead32ae0e96618f9d3eadf58d.png) --- # Need help or have questions? You can reach out on my [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/rURmwrzUcz) (*preferred*) or open an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/Traben-0/stuck_arrows_for_all). --- [![discord](https://i.imgur.com/vU8pcbf.png)](https://discord.com/invite/rURmwrzUcz) ![-](https://i.imgur.com/yZzzW4Q.pngg) [![curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/rpoyjVG.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-pin-cushions) ![-](https://i.imgur.com/VgKekoJ.png) [![modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/7fioiRx.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-pin-cushions) ![-](https://i.imgur.com/tiNmDIH.png) [![github](https://i.imgur.com/EYNx6oL.png)](https://github.com/Traben-0/stuck_arrows_for_all) ![-](https://i.imgur.com/yar5K6v.png) [![kofi](https://i.imgur.com/xdhWKwC.png)](https://ko-fi.com/traben) --- ## Hosting Partner deal [![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BVzZfTc1/images/bfb592538f8206a6a2d72d19c90714bea91b0e07.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=641)
